### Post by Thrombone on 2007-11-12
Hello, I am a newbie to Ubuntu I tried to run avant-window-navigator and got this

Error: Screen isn't composited. Please run compiz (-fusion) or another compositing manager.

I believe I have a NVIDIA GeForce4 420 Go 32M

---

### Post by akiratheoni on 2007-11-12
You need to install or enable Compiz-Fusion.

If you have Gutsy Gibbon (7.10) then it should already be installed. Go to System -> Preferences -> Appearance -> Desktop Effects and enable it. 

If you don't have Gutsy Gibbon and you have Feisty, try this thread, it might work: [http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=359367](http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=359367)

---

### Post by maharbA on 2007-11-12
see if you can turn on desktop effects (it's in different places depending on whether you're using Feisty or Gutsy -- but it's always in SYSTEM>PREFERENCES)

What you need is a composite window manager. Nowadays (since Feisty) Ubuntu comes with Compiz, but you need to enable it (that's what desktop effects are)

If you can successfully enable desktop effects, you should be all set. If not, check the restricted drivers manager and install the nvidia driver.

hope that helps

---
